TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Buklavu ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Genhe'I go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 225 buwan, 716 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 689 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 27 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 89%, Paywan 3%, Amis 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Buklavu hya' ga Su nun sung. tay 'llaw na Buklavu hya' ga Kaminu. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Buklavu ga ungat kyokay. hasisyo maki 1 hasisyo ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan khu skwan biru maki 1 khu skwan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč ő≤ukla*u …£a nija mki s~…ēku tajto keŇč atu …£enńße Ēi …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a *** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *% kjan ku ** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, ő≤unun **%, pajwan *%, amis~…ē *%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *%. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj mkjańßu Ē na ő≤ukla*u ńßja Ē …£a s~…ēu nun s~…ēuŇč. taj Ēllaw na ő≤ukla*u ńßja Ē …£a kaminu. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj qalaŇč ő≤ukla*u …£a uŇčat kjokaj. ńßas~…ēis~…ējo maki * ńßas~…ēis~…ējo s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan kńßu s~…ēkwan ő≤iru maki * kńßu s~…ēkwan ő≤iru. tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
S.FORM: alang Buklavu ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Genhe'I go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 225 buwan, 716 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 689 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 27 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 89%, Paywan 3%, Amis 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Buklavu hya' ga Su nun sung. tay 'llaw na Buklavu hya' ga Kaminu. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Buklavu ga ungat kyokay. hasisyo maki 1 hasisyo ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan khu skwan biru maki 1 khu skwan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč ő≤ukla*u …£a nija mki s~…ēku tajto keŇč atu …£enńße Ēi …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a *** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *% kjan ku ** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, ő≤unun **%, pajwan *%, amis~…ē *%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *%. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj mkjańßu Ē na ő≤ukla*u ńßja Ē …£a s~…ēu nun s~…ēuŇč. taj Ēllaw na ő≤ukla*u ńßja Ē …£a kaminu. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj qalaŇč ő≤ukla*u …£a uŇčat kjokaj. ńßas~…ēis~…ējo maki * ńßas~…ēis~…ējo s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan kńßu s~…ēkwan ő≤iru maki * kńßu s~…ēkwan ő≤iru. tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
